topic.title: harbor-root
topic.shortdesc: Cold-start routing for the regulated change-control slice. Use for first-hop orientation.

section.title: Harbor system overview
section.p: Use the root layer for regulated change-control purpose, authority posture, and first-hop routing.

ul.li: Harbor Change Control coordinates regulated production changes for clinical data systems and external auditor review.
Human-primary SOP pages are allowed only when the pair declares sync_source=human-primary explicitly.
Cold-start routing begins at harbor-root and summary routing continues through harbor-capsule.
